---
name: capillary:phi
description: Review code for HIPAA, PII, and PHI compliance violations before merge
---

<!-- Generated by harness generate-slash-commands. Do not edit. -->

<context>
Cognitive mode: meticulous-verifier
Type: rigid
</context>

<objective>
Review code for HIPAA, PII, and PHI compliance violations before merge

Phases:

- identify: Scan for PHI/PII field patterns using heuristic field list
- check-logging: Verify PHI fields are not logged, printed, or written to stdout/files
- check-client: Verify PHI fields are not exposed to client-side code or API responses
- check-auth: Verify access to PHI-bearing endpoints requires authentication and authorization
- check-audit: Verify PHI access events are audit-logged with who/what/when
- report: Produce findings report with severity classification (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM)
  </objective>
